name: Poké Ball ×5
locationDescription: Gift from Professor Oak after receiving your starter.

name: Potion
locationDescription: In the mart (free sample from the delivery mission).

name: TM41 Torment
locationDescription: Old man's house south of the Poké Mart after the tutorial.

name: Antidote
locationDescription: Item ball on the grass in Route 2 south section.

name: Antidote
locationDescription: Item ball inside the forest — near the first patch of tall grass.

name: Potion
locationDescription: Item ball deeper in Viridian Forest.

name: Boulder Badge
locationDescription: Reward for defeating Brock. Enables HM Strength outside battle.

name: TM27 Return
locationDescription: Item ball east of Pewter City on Route 3.

name: Moon Stone
locationDescription: Hidden item in Mt. Moon — use Itemfinder. Also held by wild Clefairy (rarely).

name: TM46 Thief
locationDescription: Item ball in the deeper section of Mt. Moon.

name: Helix Fossil / Dome Fossil
locationDescription: Choose one at the end of Mt. Moon from the Super Nerd. Helix → Omanyte, Dome → Kabuto.

name: TM35 Flamethrower
locationDescription: Item ball on Route 4 east of Mt. Moon.

name: Cascade Badge
locationDescription: Reward for defeating Misty. Enables HM Cut outside battle.

name: TM29 Psychic
locationDescription: Trade reward in Cerulean City house (Poliwhirl for Jynx).

name: Bike Voucher
locationDescription: Reward from the Pokémon Fan Club chairman in Vermilion (accessible after Cerulean).
